title: A communication from the Department of Elementary and Secondary Education (see Section 1P of Chapter 69 of the General Laws) submitting the tenth annual report of the Safe and Supportive Schools Commission [copies of said report were forwarded to the committee on Ways and Means, committee on Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities, committee on Education; and the committee on Mental Health, Substance Use and Recovery, as required by said law]

sponsorships.name: Department of Elementary and Secondary Education
